meaning: n.乳状液,[医]乳剂,[摄]感光乳剂
examples: The robust design method was used to develop the prescription of the emulsion for photochromatic paper.
This paper discusses the influence of water volume fraction, temperature, and time on the rheological properties of W/O emulsion.
The influence factors on the pre-emulsion stabilization of D4-propenoic acid ester are discussed by using the mono-factor method.
There was also a slight undertone of dark porter beer, which Red Apron uses in the emulsion process.
The lower thirds of the paintings, below the false ceiling, are covered by two layers of emulsion.
